If you want to have the same Obsidian experience I have, feel free to use this repo which includes the Obsidian project themes and plugins that I always use.

# Steps:

## Clone the Repo

```shell
git clone https://github.com/OmarAlmasri/Obsidian-Plugins.git
```

## Rename the folder

Rename the folder you cloned to **.obsidian**

## Open in Obsidian

Add the **.obsidian** folder to your existing Obsidian vault and enjoy!👾
